data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of multiple providers (stylists) with individual calendars. However, the evidence only mentions a single booking scenario involving one stylist and does not provide any details about the individual calendars for each stylist. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for multiple providers with their own calendars, as there is no supporting data to confirm this aspect of the use case.
gaps: No evidence of multiple providers (stylists) having individual calendars.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
